## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss fwd.digital's financial models, growth strategy, and potential Chief of Staff role with candidate Bridget McGillivray.](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is experiencing rapid growth, adding $1-1.2M in ARR monthly with 29 clients at $12k avg](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Company is cash flow positive with projections reaching $13-15M ARR in near future](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Bridget is considering joining as Chief of Staff; Marcel aims to wrap up hiring process quickly](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Marcel to send additional materials (deck, financials, strategy docs) for Bridget's review](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

## Topics

### Financial Performance and Projections

  - [Currently at $4M ARR, adding $1-1.2M monthly (5-8 new accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Projections show potential for $13-15M ARR in near future](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Cash flow positive with high margins (40% EBITDA projected)](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Average contract value: $12k/month](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [29 current clients](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

### Contract Structure

  - [Recurring revenue model with 90-day pilot periods](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Shifted to 12-month contracts from cancel-anytime model](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Some contracts converting from 3-month to longer terms (e.g., Jen from $25k to $40k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Growth Strategy and Challenges

  - [Marcel controlling growth due to capacity constraints](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Potential to exceed projections if maintaining current sales pace](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Need to invest in engineering and talent to support faster scaling](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Exploring additional revenue streams (excess inventory talent, community subscriptions, API components)](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### Hiring and Talent Management

  - [Plans to hire 25 engineers (currently have 2)](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Hiring ahead for strategists, pod leads, and account managers](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Leveraging international talent for cost-effective, high-quality hires](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Strong talent pipelines with AI-assisted pre-vetting](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Posted role for Head of Talent, aiming to delegate hiring processes](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)

### Chief of Staff Role Discussion

  - [Marcel outlined expectations: high-level management, process improvement, hiring key roles](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Bridget expressed initial concerns about time spent on hiring/staffing, which Marcel addressed](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Discussed potential for in-person meeting and accelerated hiring timeline](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

### Next Steps for Bridget's Candidacy

  - [Marcel to send additional materials (investor deck, financial models, strategy docs, call recordings)](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up Zoom call to discuss specific responsibilities and Marcel's to-do list](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Explore possibility of in-person meeting next Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Marcel to share initial offer details, emphasizing competitive cash and equity package](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send comprehensive information package to Bridget tonight](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [Alice (EA) to schedule follow-up Zoom call between tomorrow and Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Explore scheduling an in-person meeting for next Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Marcel to share initial offer details with Bridget](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Aim for potential start date in the first week of February](https://fathom.video/share/3HnZ8XsbPRXkFTyoeXjNvg5DxnWrBnnN?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
